explanation: The diagram clearly shows multiple external clients (Customer Management Frontend, Customer Self-Service Frontend, Policy Management Frontend, Risk Management Client) communicating directly with their respective backend services via HTTP, HTTP+WebSocket, and gRPC, without any intermediary API Gateway. Each frontend has direct point-to-point connections to one or more backend services, exposing the internal topology. There is no single unified entry point to handle cross-cutting concerns such as authentication, rate limiting, SSL termination, or routing. This is a textbook example of the No API Gateway smell.
